debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.n P / Erdos392.Params.L P
hp' : ↑p > √↑(Erdos392.Params.n P)
⊢ Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p ≥ -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P)

failed_attempts:
have hsum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≥ 0 := by
    exact Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x _ => Nat.cast_nonneg _
  have hfact : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · rw [factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']
      exact Int.ofNat_le.mpr (le_add_right (Nat.div_le_div_right (by nlinarith)))
    · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hsum, Nat.cast_zero, zero_sub,
    neg_le_neg_iff, hfact]
  omega

have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
    calc (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
      _ ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
          sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
      _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) := mul_le_mul_left _ <| by
          convert count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p (by aesop : p > 0) using 1
          rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (div_le_self _ _)]
      _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p (by aesop : p > 0)
  have hfact_eq : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · exact factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime, hprime]
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact_eq]
  omega

have hprime : p.Prime → P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M := fun hp_prime => by
    have h_fact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p :=
      factorial_factorization_eq_div hp_prime hp'
    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
      calc
        (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
          ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
            sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) :=
            mul_le_mul_left _ <| count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p hp_prime.pos
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p hp_prime.pos
    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, h_fact]
    omega
  by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · exact hprime hprime
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
    calc
      (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
        ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
          sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) :=
          mul_le_mul_left _ <| by
            convert count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p (by
              rcases eq_or_ne p 0 with rfl | hp_pos
              · simp_all
              · exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hp_pos) using 1
            rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (div_le_self _ _)]
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p (by
          rcases eq_or_ne p 0 with rfl | hp_pos
          · simp_all
          · exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hp_pos)
  have hfact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := factorial_factorization_eq_div (by
    contrapose! hp'
    simp_all [Real.sqrt_nonneg, Nat.cast_nonneg]) hp'
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact]
  omega

  omega

  · have hfact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
      calc (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
        _ ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
            sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) := mul_le_mul_left _ <| by
            convert count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p hprime.pos using 1
            rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (div_le_self _ _)]
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p hprime.pos
    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact]
    omega
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

have hprime : p.Prime → P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M := fun hprime => by
    have h_fact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p :=
      factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
      calc
        (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
          ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
            sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) := mul_le_mul_left _ <|
            count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p hprime.pos
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p hprime.pos
    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, h_fact]
    omega
  by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · exact hprime hprime
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
    calc
      (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
        ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
          sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) :=
          mul_le_mul_left _ <| count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p (by
            rcases eq_or_ne p 0 with rfl | h; · simp_all
            exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h)
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p (by
            rcases eq_or_ne p 0 with rfl | h; · simp_all
            exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h)
  have hfact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · exact factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime, hprime]
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact]
  omega

have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
    calc
      (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
        ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
          sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) :=
          mul_le_mul_left _ <| by
            convert count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p (by
              rcases eq_or_ne p 0 with rfl | -; · simp_all
              exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by
                rw [h] at hp'; norm_num at hp') using 1
            rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (div_le_self _ _)]
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p (by
          rcases eq_or_ne p 0 with rfl | -; · simp_all
          exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by
            rw [h] at hp'; norm_num at hp')
  have hfact : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) = P.n / p := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · rw [factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']
    · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact]
  omega

  · have h_fact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p :=

      calc
        (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
          _ ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=

have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by
    calc
      (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum

        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p (by aesop : p > 0)

  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact_eq]
